{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Overlord Indirial
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Overlord Indirial]] is trapped outside a village in [[Lysander]]'s realm along with [[Travelers]] and men.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Overlord Indirial]] is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] who only appears on business for his realm or [[Queen]] [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
